from the limbs of the native occupied by the planets. Certain
stars counted from the natal one are assigned to different limbs
of the person. For example, in the case of the Sun's transit
the natal star is called the Face. So if the Sun transits the natal

254 FINDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
star of a person, he is supposed to be sealed on the face of the
native. The effect of this is not at all happy. I am tabulating
below for your convenience the stars constituting the limbs
and their effects in the case of the Sun and other planets separately.
Sun
Stars Limbs Effects
(a) First star or the natal star Face Destruction
(b) 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 5th Flead Great prosperity
(c) 6th, 7th, 8th and 9 th. Chest Victory
(d) 10th, 11th, 12th and 13th Right hand Wealth
(e) 14th, to 19th (six stars) The feet Poverty
(f) 20th to 23rd (four stars) Left hand Physical ailments
(g) 24th and 25th The eyes Gain
(h) 26th and 27th Genital organ Danger to fife
